Operation 'getForecast' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity on required inputs (location coordinates), specific output fields (allergen types, risk levels), and available filtering options. Enhanced version specifies input requirements, output structure, and optional parameters to improve AI agent decision-making about when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns up to 5 days of daily pollen information for a given location in more than 65 countries, up to 1km resolution.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve pollen forecast for specified location
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves up to 5 days of daily pollen forecast data for a specified geographic location across 65+ countries with 1km resolution. Requires location coordinates (latitude/longitude) as input. Returns pollen concentration levels, allergen types, and risk assessments for each day. Supports optional parameters for filtering allergen types and specifying forecast language.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity on required inputs (location coordinates), specific output fields (allergen types, risk levels), and available filtering options. Enhanced version specifies input requirements, output structure, and optional parameters to improve AI agent decision-making about when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getHeatmapTile' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary lacks specificity about the tile's purpose. Description omits critical input parameters (mapType, zoom, x, y coordinates) and their meanings, making it difficult for AI agents to construct proper requests. Enhanced version clarifies all required parameters, their purpose, the binary output format, and the operation's use case in map visualization workflows.

data.current_description: Returns a byte array containing the data of the tile PNG image for pollen heatmap visualization.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a PNG image tile for pollen heatmap visualization at specified map coordinates. Requires mapType (pollen allergen type), zoom level, and tile coordinates (x, y) as inputs. Returns a byte array containing the encoded PNG image data suitable for rendering on map interfaces. Used for displaying spatial pollen concentration patterns across geographic regions.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks specificity about the tile's purpose. Description omits critical input parameters (mapType, zoom, x, y coordinates) and their meanings, making it difficult for AI agents to construct proper requests. Enhanced version clarifies all required parameters, their purpose, the binary output format, and the operation's use case in map visualization workflows.
